posts.author: michaelcoral (michael hafzi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

To group Subitems based on the same status

What are you trying to achieve

Enable the ability to group Subitems by status so teams can monitor and manage workflow more efficiently across the board, regardless of how the Main items are organized or what status the Main items currently have.
